{"urn":"urn:li:dataset:(urn:li:dataPlatform:powerbi,b2fd91.datahub_order_entries.Essential_KPI_Measures,PROD)","fields":[{"fieldPath":"Revenue Per Customer","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"DIVIDE([Total Revenue], [Total Customers], 0)","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"Average Order Value","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"DIVIDE([Total Revenue], [Total Orders], 0)","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"New Customers","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('ORDER_DETAILS'[customer_id]),
    FILTER(
        'ORDER_DETAILS',
        'ORDER_DETAILS'","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"PY Revenue","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"CALCULATE([Total Revenue], SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR('ORDER_DETAILS'[order_date]))","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"Total Customers","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"DISTINCTCOUNT('ORDER_DETAILS'[customer_id])","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"YTD Revenue","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"CALCULATE([Total Revenue], DATESYTD('ORDER_DETAILS'[order_date]))","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"Total Orders","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"DISTINCTCOUNT('ORDER_DETAILS'[order_id])","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"Total Revenue","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"SUMX('ORDER_DETAILS', 'ORDER_DETAILS'[order_total])","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"Fulfillment Rate","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE([Total Orders], 'ORDER_DETAILS'[delivery_status]  "Not Shipped"),
    [Total Orders], 
    0
)","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"Total Products Sold","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"SUM('ORDER_DETAILS'[quantity])","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"YoY Growth","nativeDataType":"measure","description":"DIVIDE([YTD Revenue] - [PY Revenue], [PY Revenue], 0)","nullable":false},{"fieldPath":"Value","nativeDataType":"String","nullable":false}],"totalFields":12,"returned":12,"remainingCount":0,"matchingCount":11,"offset":0}
